strengths: The log provides a detailed record of the pipeline search process.
The log includes information about the algorithms used and their performance.

issues.description: The log does not provide a clear indication of the best-performing pipeline.
issues.evidence: The log mentions multiple pipelines and their performance but does not clearly indicate which one performed best.

issues.description: The log does not provide a clear summary of the pipeline search process.
issues.evidence: The log includes detailed information about the pipeline search process but does not provide a clear summary of the results.
